overall.description: First-person exploration through a post-apocalyptic marsh environment in S.T.A.L.K.E.R. 2, featuring distinctive red autumn vegetation, still water reflections, and industrial power lines. The camera moves steadily through shallow water and onto dry land toward a tunnel entrance in a cliff face under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow marsh pool with cliff face and distant tunnel

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow marsh water toward a distant tunnel entrance visible in the cliff face

entered.detail: tall rock cliff with sparse trees growing along the top edge
dark arched tunnel entrance at the base of the distant cliff
shallow still water reflecting the overcast sky and surrounding trees
tall thin trees with autumn foliage growing atop the cliff
dense red and orange marsh grass along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view wading through shallow marsh water. A tall cliff face rises on the left topped with sparse trees, while a dark tunnel entrance is visible in the distance on the right. The water creates mirror-like reflections of the overcast sky and vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: marsh with high voltage power lines

events.description: large electricity pylons and power lines become prominent on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing through shallow water passing industrial power lines and electricity pylons

entered.detail: tall metal lattice tower supporting high voltage power lines
multiple horizontal cables stretching across the sky
large snow-capped or misty mountain visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The camera continues through the marsh as massive electricity pylons and power lines dominate the left side of the frame. The cliff face draws closer on the left while a distant mountain becomes visible in the background. The tunnel entrance remains visible on the right as the camera progresses.

events.description: transition from water to dry land walking on a grassy mound covered in leaves

agents.ego_description: moving from shallow water onto a dry grassy mound covered in fallen leaves and red vegetation

entered.detail: narrow raised path covered in brown leaves and red grass

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from water onto a dry mound path covered in fallen leaves. The industrial power lines recede behind as the cliff face draws closer on the left. The tunnel entrance shifts from the right to the left side of the frame as the camera circles toward it, with marsh pools now visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff base path approaching tunnel entrance

events.description: approaching the dark tunnel entrance at the base of the cliff

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliff base toward the dark tunnel entrance

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera walking on dry ground along the base of the cliff, approaching the tunnel entrance which now dominates the left side of the frame. The marsh water and distant mountain fade from view as the camera moves closer to the dark tunnel mouth.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a reflective marshland toward the dark mouth of a cliffside tunnel. It begins by wading through shallow water that mirrors the overcast sky, with a tall cliff face rising to the left and a distant tunnel entrance visible on the right. As the camera progresses, massive electricity pylons and power lines dominate the left side of the frame while a distant mountain emerges in the background. The scene then shifts as the camera transitions from the water onto a dry mound path covered in fallen leaves, circling so that the tunnel entrance moves from the right to the left of the frame. Finally, the camera walks along the base of the cliff on dry ground, leaving the marsh pools behind as the dark tunnel entrance expands to dominate the view.
